title: Fullscreen for Modal's - like an Issue, Sprint or Epic

posts.author: PureKrome (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi moday.dev,

the modals, like the issues modal isn’t that practical at times on larger monitors. We really need the ability to go full screen on these modals, etc. There’s so much wasted desktop space on either side of the modal which could be productively used.

Please consider
